category_sources: source_facts.description says Chapel is a programming language for productive parallel computing at scale; official Chapel docs and GitHub README describe Chapel as a modern productive parallel programming language.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is chapel; official homepage, docs, and GitHub README use Chapel.
docs_sources: Official Chapel README links to chapel-lang.org/docs, learn, and language resources; official documentation site contains the online docs and language specification.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/chapel-lang/chapel; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official GitHub README/topics identify Chapel as a programming language for parallel, distributed, high-performance, scientific, and GPU-oriented computing.
